---
anchor-sections: false
---

::: page-content
# [Networks and Communities]{style="color:#440712; display:block; text-align:center;"}

## WELL Accredited Professional

**Credential:WELL-AP-0000173714**

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/well_ap-01 copy.jpg" 
     alt="WELL Logo" 
     width="200" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```

## City of Atlanta Sustainability Ambassadors

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/paris-silone-stroud-sustainability-ambassador.jpg" 
     alt="Paris Silone Stroud at City of Atlanta Sustainability Ambassador Celebration" 
     width="250" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```

## FIFA World Cup ‘26 Sustainability and Human Rights Volunteer

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/paris-stroud-fifa-volunteer-tryout.jpg" 
     alt="Paris Silone Stroud at FIFA World Cup Volunteer Tryouts" 
     width="200" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```

## MLB ’25 All-Star Game Green Team

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/paris-silone-stroud-green-team.jpg" 
     alt="Paris Silone Stroud at the MLB All Star Game Green Tean" 
     width="400" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```

## Green Sports Alliance

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/paris-stroud-green-sports-alliance-summit.JPG" 
     alt="Paris Silone Stroud at Green Sports Alliance Summit Reception" 
     width="250" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```

## American Public Health Association

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/apha-logo.jpg" 
     width="250" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```

## Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority Incorporated

```{=html}
<img src="pictures/AKA-1908.jpeg" 
     width="200" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />
```
:::
